name: ERIG
description: Student rocketry and space initiative at TU Braunschweig, working on microgravity experiments, CubeSats, payloads, and rovers.

name: ASTG – Aerospace Team Graz
description: Austrian student aerospace team building research rockets and experimental payloads at TU Graz.

name: BEARS
description: Berlin Engineering and Rocketry Student Society — building rockets and robotics systems at TU Berlin.

name: TU Wien Space Team
description: Austria's premier student space team at TU Wien, known for internationally competitive rockets and experiments.

name: Auxspace
description: Developing modular and reusable rocket elements and open-source software platforms at TH Augsburg.

name: KSat
description: Stuttgart student team specialising in small satellites and microgravity experiments.

name: TUDSaT
description: Student team at TU Darmstadt building satellites and sounding rockets.

name: SeeSat
description: Building a wildfire detection satellite at DHBW Friedrichshafen.

name: FAR – Forum für Amateurraketentechnik
description: National German rocketry association open to all space enthusiasts, not university-based.

name: WüSpace
description: Developing space software and hardware systems with a strong open-source culture at Universität Würzburg.

name: STA – Space Team Aachen
description: Interdisciplinary student space team at RWTH Aachen working on rockets, rovers, and CubeSats.

name: ASTRA
description: Bremen student team developing sounding rockets, known for Project Karman aiming for the Kármán line.

name: Moon Aixperts
description: Researching lunar In-Situ Resource Utilisation (ISRU) technology and resource extraction at RWTH Aachen.

name: SPROG
description: Student Propulsion and Rocketry Group developing experimental rockets at JLU Gießen and TH Mittelhessen.

name: Sundspace
description: Hybrid propulsion rocketry team at HS Stralsund, competing at EuRoC.

name: STAR Dresden
description: Space Team at TU Dresden working on rockets, rovers, and satellite payloads.

name: WARR
description: Wissenschaftliche Arbeitsgemeinschaft für Raketentechnik und Raumfahrt — Germany's largest student space team at TU Munich, with projects spanning rockets, satellites, and hyperloop.

name: HyEnD
description: Hybrid Engine Development team at Universität Stuttgart, building high-performance hybrid rocket engines.

name: ROCKIT
description: Student rocketry team at KIT Karlsruhe focused on reusable and re-landing rocket technologies.
